Premium Grade Vinyl Disposable Gloves Keep hands & surfaces protect by wearing these ambidextrous powder-free gloves. These gloves create a barrier between your hands and the objects you're handling, keeping your hands clean while preventing oils and dirt from transferring to surfaces. Designed for single use, they help reduce cross-contamination by being thrown away after each task. Ideal for laboratories, food service, clean rooms, and janitorial tasks, these gloves offer reliable protection in any environment.
